titel: Statement by Commissioner Kubilius following the Eastern Border summit
html:
European Commission speech in Gdańsk, June 25, 2026:

  1. The summit emphasized that the "Eastern Flank Watch" initiative is intended to defend the region surrounding the eastern border and to protect the entire Union.
  2. The member states participating in the "Eastern Flank"...
tldr: The EU leadership has decided on a new defense cooperation initiative to protect the eastern border and all EU member states.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the executive body of the EU, held a meeting in Gdańsk. They discussed how to defend the region along the eastern border.

They have launched a project called "Eastern Flank Watch." The purpose of this project is to protect both the countries located near the border and all other EU member states through improved cooperation.

This decision strengthens the security of the entire union through joint measures along the eastern border.
